description: StoryMaker lets the AI write a story from a single sentence prompt. Demonstrates creative LLM use over plain text. Works in simulator with mChatAI Cloud configured.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Got an idea? Let AI write the story.

scenes.name: Tap StoryMaker
scenes.narration: StoryMaker takes any spark and turns it into a story.
scenes.fallbackNarration: StoryMaker turns a single idea into a full story.

scenes.name: Type a prompt
scenes.narration: Type a starting idea - a lighthouse keeper who finds a map.

actions.text: A lighthouse keeper finds a map hidden inside an old shell.

scenes.name: Generate the story
scenes.narration: Generate - AI writes the whole thing.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Generate the story with one tap.

scenes.name: Show the story
scenes.narration: Read what the AI wrote - then edit, expand, or share.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
